name: Fawry
description: Fawry — Egypt's largest payment network with 300,000+ agent locations supporting bill payments, cards, and mobile wallet transactions.

seo.title: Fawry — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Fawry: Fawry — Egypt's largest payment network with 300,000+ agent locations supporting bill payments, cards, and mobile wallet transactions.

when_to_use: Bill payments and cash collection via 300k+ Egyptian retail agent network
Mobile wallet and Fawry code payment collection for digital services in Egypt
Cash-based payment acceptance at scale for unbanked Egyptian users
Recurring utility and subscription payments through Egyptian retail network

review.verdict: Essential for Egyptian merchants serving unbanked customers — foundational rail, not a dev-first gateway.
review.best_for: Egyptian merchants needing cash acceptance via agent network
review.not_for: Developer-first teams or merchants outside Egypt
